subcodes.first_line: Verily, in the Qur'an the words "if ye fear that ye cannot act equitably, then one only" betoken that in the sight of God the decree of unity is acceptable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در قرآن کلمهٴ فان خفتم الا تعدلوا فواحدة دلالت بر این مینماید که عند الله حکم واحد مقبول است
subcodes.subjects: @Islamic laws and jurisprudence, @laws of marriage and dowry, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
